name: should create a query for week projected stats
description: Test case for should create a query for week projected stats
expected_query: select "player"."pid", player.first_name, player.last_name, CASE WHEN rosters_players.slot = 13 THEN 'injured_reserve' WHEN rosters_players.slot = 12 THEN 'practice_squad' WHEN rosters_players.slot IS NULL THEN 'free_agent' ELSE 'active_roster' END AS player_league_roster_status, rosters_players.slot, rosters_players.tid, rosters_players.tag, "t9948ce2ff28f8e0bb8522bc6cf70d3c2"."passing_yards" AS "week_projected_pass_yds_0", "player"."primary_position" from "player" left join "rosters_players" on "rosters_players"."pid" = "player"."pid" and "rosters_players"."year" = 2026 and "rosters_players"."week" = 0 and "rosters_players"."lid" = 1 left join "projections_index" as "t9948ce2ff28f8e0bb8522bc6cf70d3c2" on "t9948ce2ff28f8e0bb8522bc6cf70d3c2"."pid" = "player"."pid" and "t9948ce2ff28f8e0bb8522bc6cf70d3c2"."season_year" = 2023 and "t9948ce2ff28f8e0bb8522bc6cf70d3c2"."week" = '2' and "t9948ce2ff28f8e0bb8522bc6cf70d3c2"."sourceid" = 18 and "t9948ce2ff28f8e0bb8522bc6cf70d3c2"."season_type" = 'REG' group by player.first_name, player.last_name, rosters_players.slot, rosters_players.tid, rosters_players.tag, "t9948ce2ff28f8e0bb8522bc6cf70d3c2"."passing_yards", "player"."pid", "player"."last_name", "player"."first_name", "player"."primary_position" order by 8 DESC NULLS LAST, "player"."pid" asc limit 500
